steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The logical relationship is cause-effect. The blank needs a transition signaling that Ahoy earned his place in history by means of his naval service.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — "In any case": signals concession or dismissal, implying the historical recognition is true regardless of some prior complication. No complication is raised here. ✗
  • Choice B — "Finally": signals the last item in a sequence. But the second sentence is not the final step in a list; it is a result of the service. ✗
  • Choice C — "For instance": signals exemplification. It would imply Ahoy's historical recognition is a specific example of a general trend, but no general trend is stated. ✗
  • Choice D — "In doing so": signals that the result (earning a place in history) came through the action just described (naval service), so fits. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
